name: maintenance-mode
description: Global kill switch. When on, mutation endpoints return 503 and the frontend shows a maintenance banner. Does not affect /healthz, /readyz, /metrics.

name: ranked-matchmaking-enabled
description: Gate for the ranked matchmaking queue. Default ON. When OFF, match-service rejects new /queue entries (503 ranked_disabled) and the frontend disables the Ranked tab. Already-proposed matches can still be accepted/declined.

name: chat-enabled
description: Gate for in-room chat + DMs. When off, chat handlers reject sends with 503 and the UI shows a paused state.

name: achievements-enabled
description: Gate for achievement tracking. When off, the event consumer skips progress updates; previously earned achievements remain visible.

name: game-tictactoe-enabled
description: Enable TicTacToe as a playable game. When off, it's filtered from the games list in the lobby.

name: game-rootaccess-enabled
description: Enable Root Access as a playable game. When off, it's filtered from the games list in the lobby.

name: devtools-for-admins
description: Expose TanStack router/query devtools + WsDevtools + ScenarioPicker in production builds, but only to users with the owner role. Requires BOTH this flag and an owner role to render.
